arts.ttl: Everything Ratcliffe, Ashworth and Berrada have said about Erik ten Hag at Manchester United
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe went on record to speak about Erik ten Hag on Friday as pressure increased on his position.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery has explained how he can unlock Aston Villa's frightening firepower
arts.sum: Ramsey and Leon Bailey are both doubts to feature for Villa this weekend against Manchester United, and if both players don't make it, then Emery will be left with a decision to either use Rogers or Ian Maatsen on the left as Jaden Philogene would likely operate from the right like he did against Bayern on Wednesday. Rogers played off the left in place of Ramsey last season, while Emery preferred to use one of John McGinn, Youri Tielemans or Moussa Diaby in support of Ollie Watkins.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Jim Ratcliffe blamed for crisis as Sir Alex Ferguson snubs Red Devils
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag remains under serious pressure following Manchester United’s dramatic draw with Porto in the Europa League on Thursday and desperately needs a result against Aston Villa at the weekend

arts.ttl: Unai Emery fumes at Morgan Rogers decision as Aston Villa boss sends simple message
arts.sum: Aston Villa are basking in their Champions League triumph over Bayern Munich and meet an ailing Manchester United ahead of the international break, with Unai Emery send a clear message to national bosses

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Man United: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Aston Villa v Man United: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery doubles down on England issue as Aston Villa boss raises fresh concern
arts.sum: Unai Emery has voiced his frustration that some international managers contact his players before they report for national team duty as he wants them to be fully focused on matters at Aston Villa. I tell the players, I don’t like it when you are here and the national team coaches call.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes addresses Man Utd crisis with honest admission after red cards
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has been sent off in both of Manchester United's last two fixtures, adding to the mounting pressure on manager Erik ten Hag, who's fighting for his job

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Garnacho asking price revealed
arts.sum: The Argentina international has only started four games in all competitions so far this season, and interest from multiple top European clubs has emerged following his reduced role under Erik ten Hag. Barcelona and Juventus are both tracking his situation at Old Trafford, but Man Utd are reluctant to lose the Argentina international and will reportedly not accept a bid that amounts to less than €83m.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe says Manchester United decision on Erik ten Hag ‘not my call’
arts.sum: Sunday’s 3-0 home defeat at Tottenham was compounded four days later as United blew a two-goal lead against Porto

arts.ttl: “That’s gone out of our head” – 66-goal Man Utd legend goes on furious rant about Ten Hag transfer policy
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Dwight Yorke has slammed the club’s transfer record under Erik ten Hag. Yorke is a popular figure at Old Trafford after scoring 66 goals in 152 games between 1998 and 2002, winning a host of major honours, including the treble in 1998/99. But those days seem like ancient history given United’s […] The post “That’s gone out of our head” – 66-goal Man Utd legend goes on furious rant about Ten Hag transfer policy appeared first on CaughtOffside.
